description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and practical usage, gauging proficiency through multiple‑choice questions with a light, encouraging tone. It is positioned as a moderate‑difficulty test suitable for self‑evaluation, aiming to help learners decide if CSS expertise merits a resume highlight.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, modern CSS features, responsive design, layout techniques, CSS tooling
Audience: Web developers, front‑end engineers, and design‑oriented programmers seeking to validate or improve their CSS skills.
